mapper.insert: INSERT INTO challenges (mno, title, description, emoji, color, start_date, end_date, image_url, cond_type, cond_value, approval_status, visibility) VALUES (#{mno}, #{title}, #{description}, COALESCE(#{emoji},'🏆'), COALESCE(#{color},'#77C0B3'), #{startDate}, #{endDate}, #{imageUrl}, #{condType}, #{condValue}, COALESCE(#{approvalStatus},'APPROVED'), COALESCE(#{visibility},'VISIBLE'))
mapper.select: SELECT c.*, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM challenge_participants cp WHERE cp.cno = c.cno) AS participant_count FROM challenges c ORDER BY c.cno DESC

SELECT c.*, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM challenge_participants cp WHERE cp.cno = c.cno) AS participant_count FROM challenges c WHERE c.approval_status = 'APPROVED' AND c.visibility = 'VISIBLE' ORDER BY
c.cno DESC participant_count DESC, c.cno DESC
mapper.update: UPDATE challenges SET approval_status = #{status} WHERE cno = #{cno}
UPDATE challenges SET visibility = #{visibility} WHERE cno = #{cno}
mapper.select: SELECT c.*, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM challenge_participants cp WHERE cp.cno = c.cno) AS participant_count FROM challenges c WHERE c.cno = #{cno}
SELECT * FROM challenge_participants WHERE cno = #{cno} AND mno = #{mno}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO challenge_participants (cno, mno, progress, done_days, total_days, pledge) VALUES (#{cno}, #{mno}, COALESCE(#{progress},0), COALESCE(#{doneDays},0), COALESCE(#{totalDays},7), #{pledge})
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM challenge_participants WHERE cno = #{cno} AND mno = #{mno}
mapper.select: SELECT m.name AS name, cp.mno AS mno, cp.progress AS progress, cp.done_days AS doneDays FROM challenge_participants cp JOIN members m ON m.mno = cp.mno WHERE cp.cno = #{cno} ORDER BY cp.progress DESC, cp.done_days DESC, cp.joined_at ASC LIMIT 10
SELECT cno FROM challenge_participants WHERE mno = #{mno}
SELECT c.*, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM challenge_participants cp WHERE cp.cno = c.cno) AS participant_count FROM challenges c WHERE c.mno = #{mno} ORDER BY c.cno DESC
SELECT c.*, cp.progress, cp.done_days, cp.total_days FROM challenge_participants cp JOIN challenges c ON c.cno = cp.cno WHERE cp.mno = #{mno} ORDER BY cp.joined_at DESC
